description: This pipeline applies automatic thresholding to an image, followed by morphological hole filling to create a binary mask, and then analyzes the resulting mask to extract measurements from connected components, effectively identifying and quantifying objects within the image.

776ad311-a90b-4e4f-af81-31fb6d4317e4.name: ij1-morph-binary-fillholes2d
776ad311-a90b-4e4f-af81-31fb6d4317e4.description: Applies a morphological hole filling operation to binary images.If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

55c26690-330e-4a72-b10c-8d941944b92a.name: ij1-analyze-find-particles2d
55c26690-330e-4a72-b10c-8d941944b92a.description: Converts mask images into ROI by applying a connected components algorithm and generates measurements. Please note that this algorithm will always trace the external object boundaries and convert them into polygonal ROIs. This means that holes will be closed. This node requires a thresholded image as input and will extract measurements from the thresholded image. If you already have ROI available and want measurements, use 'Extract ROI statistics'.If higher-dimensional data is provided, the results are generated for each 2D slice.

fe98ec61-b3a6-43c3-92ea-fa7014754934.name: ij1-threshold-auto2d
fe98ec61-b3a6-43c3-92ea-fa7014754934.description:
Applies an auto-thresholding algorithm. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
